title: Does mondayDB has a column limit per board?
excerpt: I tried searching within monday.com for the answer to this question with no success. I’m wondering if as per mondayDB has increased the limit of boards and items per board, if by any chance the column limit has increased…

posts.author: zonum (Jose Munoz)
posts.cookedHtml: I tried searching within monday.com for the answer to this question with no success. I’m wondering if as per mondayDB has increased the limit of boards and items per board, if by any chance the column limit has increased or remains the same.

posts.author: adinap (Adina Pierce)
posts.cookedHtml: I recently hit the limit, and it is currently 500 (I’m on enterprise plan)
